genre: Post-apocalyptic survival fantasy with regression elements
style: The narrative style is gritty and highly detailed, focusing on the meticulous preparation and resource management of the protagonist. It blends urban thriller elements with supernatural survival, emphasizing the physical and psychological toll of environmental catastrophes. The prose oscillates between the claustrophobic tension of besieged apartments and the vast, surreal landscape of a mutated, flooded world.
tone: Tense, apocalyptic, and decisive, shifting between brutal survivalism and moments of strategic tranquility.
language_features: Visceral descriptions of biological mutations and environmental decay
Technical and detailed descriptions of survival equipment and security systems
Emphasis on the sensory impact of extreme temperature and weather shifts
writing_rules: Focus on the strategic importance and scarcity of resources
Use environmental changes (heat, flood, cold) as primary plot drivers
Maintain high tension during social conflicts and resource disputes
Highlight the protagonist's use of advanced technology and magical abilities
themes: Survival and adaptation in a collapsing ecosystem
The degradation of social morality and human ethics
Rebirth, vengeance, and the utilization of future knowledge
The evolution of life through mutation and resource consumption

locations.Apartment 3201: A heavily fortified urban stronghold equipped with 500V electric security, advanced surveillance, and a direct connection to a magical storage space.
locations.Magic Space: A multi-zone dimension with functional areas for cultivation and storage, which evolves and upgrades through the consumption of precious metals.
locations.Anmin City: A metropolitan area undergoing rapid, extreme environmental transformations, transitioning from lethal heatwaves to massive floods and extreme freezing temperatures.

Jiang Yan.appearance_base: Wealthy heiress; capable of altering her appearance to remain inconspicuous; specific physical traits like eye color, hair color, height, and scars are not specified.

outfits.name: Survivalist
outfits.description: Specialized gear including isolation suits for extreme heat, diving equipment for floods, and a jetpack for aerial movement.

outfits.name: Combat
outfits.description: Equipped with firearms (pistol) and heavy tools (chainsaw) for self-defense.

Jiang Yan.speech_style: Decisive, authoritative, and intimidating when necessary to protect her territory.
Jiang Yan.behavior: Highly strategic, resourceful, and ruthless; focuses on meticulous planning and extreme self-reliance.

Jiang Qiqi.appearance_base: Socially prominent; uses her status and appearance to manipulate others; specific physical traits are not specified.

outfits.name: Socialite
outfits.description: Elegant and high-status clothing used to maintain social influence.

Jiang Qiqi.speech_style: Manipulative, persuasive, and prone to inciting mob mentality and collective aggression.
Jiang Qiqi.behavior: Opportunistic and manipulative; uses social pressure and group dynamics for personal gain.

Huabao.speech_style: Communicates through instinctual or magical means to assist the protagonist.
Huabao.behavior: Consumes gold and silver to upgrade the magic space; assists in navigating flooded environments and finding valuables.
